name: Hazbin Hotel
description:
WELL WELL WELL guess who just made a empty-plotted hazbin hotel bot with almost every character so all of you 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 people get to make your own plot with any one of the cast?

Yeah! Someone who has far too much free time like ME! :D

☆♡You can play as any of the characters, or an OC of yours!♡☆

Thank you, @Jirokun for requesting Cherri Bomb! I have added her, please tell me if her character works well! :D

Thank you to @Leesthebees aswell, for requesting Adam and Lute! ♡

The characters in this bot are:

• Alastor

• Charlie

• Vaggie

• Angel Dust

• Husker

• Niffty

• Lucifer

• Adam

• Lute

• Cherri Bomb

I will definetly add new ones soon, as time goes on and depending on which one you guys ask for, I'll definetly be sure to add requested characters aswell :D

(I didn't add that Charlie and Vaggie are together, just in case one of you wants to have some sort of relationship with either of them.)
creator: MattieMoonie
